reply_original: I am truly sorry for the repetitive experience. We recently upgraded our model and it might still be adapting. To help us improve, please send screenshots of the repetitive chats to support@fantachat.ai. Our tech team will investigate your logs to fix this. We are committed to making the AI more creative for you!
reply_zh: 对于这种重复性的体验，我深表歉意。我们最近升级了模型，它可能仍处于适应阶段。为了帮助我们改进，请将重复对话的截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai。我们的技术团队将核查您的日志以修复此问题。我们致力于为您打造更具创意性的 AI！
